message:
perf(parser): keep column refs interned

Profiled the next parser expression hotspot in parse_expr_bp_inner and found the identifier arm dominating via eager String materialization for bare/qualified column refs plus cloned-token work for qualified names.

Keep ColumnRef names as Arc<str> in the AST, pass interned identifier tokens through parse_ident_expr, and avoid cloning dot/column tokens when parsing qualified column references.

Hot-path microbench (parse_statements_with_scratch, 200000 iters): 764.2 ms mean -> 759.5 ms mean (+0.6%). Fresh flat perf now shows parse_expr_bp_inner at 6.67% and parse_ident_expr at 3.41%.
